race.comment: ROSE WATER (4) started at prohibitive odds and won accordingly over this course and distance in a Class 1 16 days ago. Holding her form deep into the prep so despite getting up in the weights expect her to be too good again in a race that lacks depth of quality. ARGERICH (9) was scratched from an earlier race to be saved for this. Wasn't all that far away over 2000m here nine days ago. Back in trip but will be running on. HE'S GODSPEED (2) is a chance based on his tough win over the mile at Inverell two starts ago. Blinkers going back on may be the spark required. THE COMANCHE (8) finished a distant second at his latest outing over 1405m at Coffs Harbour. Doesn't win out of turn but is a decent each-way chance in a race like this. FAIZA STAR (7) is fitter for two runs back from a spell and cannot be ruled out.
